description: Parameter dictionary for seals emitted by chat.baten.ai. Declares the MEANING, value domain and quantization of each causal parameter — not how it is computed. Published per Causal Seal SPEC §3.3.

identity.expert.meaning: The behavioral expert profile selected to answer.

identity.adapter.meaning: The specific adapter/brain loaded to embody the selected expert.

identity.confidence.meaning: The router's confidence in the expert selection.

identity.persona_mix.meaning: When present, the named blend of adapters composing a custom persona.

engine.model.meaning: Identifier of the underlying language model that executed the text.

engine.temperature.meaning: When present, the sampling temperature applied.

field.regime.meaning: The gravitational regime of the conversation's subject at emission time.

field.omega.meaning: Label of the dominant subject attractor (the conversation's center of gravity).

shaping.chromatic.meaning: The constraint plates engaged before emission (chromatic profile).

shaping.rheometer.meaning: Text fluidity setting, from solid (terse) to fluid (flowing).

shaping.torsion.meaning: Semantic guard state: whether the trajectory was corrected before emission.

context.memory_state.meaning: The memory (Inemuri) state governing what context the model could see.

context.buffer.meaning: Number of recent messages held in live working memory.

context.memories.meaning: Number of condensed memory summaries injected into context.

context.condensed.meaning: Cumulative number of exchanges compressed since session start.
